topics.topic_en: Creating Level 0 Data Flow Diagrams (DFD) from business scenarios
topics.topic_ar: إنشاء مخططات تدفق البيانات (DFD) المستوى صفر من سيناريوهات الأعمال
topics.query_en: Level 0 Data Flow Diagram tutorial examples
topics.query_ar: شرح Level 0 DFD مخطط تدفق البيانات
topics.reason: Students often struggle to accurately extract the correct processes, external entities, and data stores from an unstructured written business scenario.

topics.topic_en: Identifying DFD syntax errors (Black holes, Miracles, Gray holes)
topics.topic_ar: تحديد أخطاء قواعد DFD (الثقوب السوداء، المعجزات، الثقوب الرمادية)
topics.query_en: DFD diagramming rules black hole miracle gray hole explained
topics.query_ar: قواعد DFD أخطاء black hole miracle gray hole
topics.reason: Memorizing and strictly applying diagramming rules to spot logical errors in data flow direction is confusing and highly error-prone.

topics.topic_en: Functional Decomposition from Level 0 to Level 1 DFD
topics.topic_ar: التحلل الوظيفي من المستوى صفر إلى المستوى الأول في DFD
topics.query_en: How to convert Level 0 DFD to Level 1 DFD functional decomposition
topics.query_ar: شرح تحويل Level 0 إلى Level 1 DFD التحلل الوظيفي
topics.reason: Breaking down a single high-level process into detailed, interconnected sub-processes without losing the overall system logic requires strong analytical skills.

topics.topic_en: Balancing Data Flow Diagrams across parent and child levels
topics.topic_ar: موازنة مخططات تدفق البيانات بين المستويات (DFD Balancing)
topics.query_en: DFD balancing parent and child diagrams tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح DFD Balancing موازنة مخططات تدفق البيانات
topics.reason: Ensuring that the exact data flow inputs and outputs of a parent process perfectly match the external flows of its child diagram is tedious and easily mismatched.

topics.topic_en: Constructing and simplifying complex Decision Tables
topics.topic_ar: بناء وتبسيط جداول القرار المعقدة (Decision Tables)
topics.query_en: Decision tables software engineering examples simplification
topics.query_ar: شرح Decision Tables جداول القرار تحليل نظم
topics.reason: Mapping multiple overlapping business conditions to correct actions and then mathematically optimizing the table to remove redundancies is logically complex.
